_comment: Explicit model_id -> contract overrides, checked before Mantle's /v1/models response and before the anthropic./non-anthropic. prefix heuristic. Value is either a bare string ("anthropic" or "openai") or an object {"contract": "openai", "openai_path_prefix": true, "disable_parallel_tool_calls": true} — openai_path_prefix and disable_parallel_tool_calls are both optional and default to false. See README 'How the target contract is resolved'.
